queries.question: What loan program interest rate do all housing finance agencies have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Loan_Programs.interest_rate  from Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs join Loan_Programs on Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs.loan_program_id = Loan_Programs.program_id join Housing_Finance_Agencies on Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs.housing_finance_agency_id = Housing_Finance_Agencies.agency_id   GROUP BY Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs.loan_program_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs.housing_finance_agency_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Housing_Finance_Agencies)

queries.question: Give me the loan program interest rate that corresponds to each housing finance agency respectively.
queries.sql: select housing_finance_agencies.name , loan_programs.interest_rate from Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs join Loan_Programs on Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs.loan_program_id = Loan_Programs.program_id join Housing_Finance_Agencies on Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs.housing_finance_agency_id = Housing_Finance_Agencies.agency_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?interest_rate WHERE {
  ?housing_finance_agencies_loan_programs a :Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs .
  ?loan_programs a :Loan_Programs .
  ?housing_finance_agencies_loan_programs p:hasLoan_Programs ?loan_programs .
  ?housing_finance_agencies a :Housing_Finance_Agencies .
  ?housing_finance_agencies_loan_programs p:hasHousing_Finance_Agencies ?housing_finance_agencies .
  ?housing_finance_agencies p:name ?name .
  ?loan_programs p:interest_rate ?interest_rate .
}

queries.question: Show me the interest rates and descriptions of the loan programs every finance agency offers.
queries.sql: SELECT Loan_Programs.description, Loan_Programs.interest_rate  from Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs join Loan_Programs on Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs.loan_program_id = Loan_Programs.program_id join Housing_Finance_Agencies on Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs.housing_finance_agency_id = Housing_Finance_Agencies.agency_id   GROUP BY Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs.loan_program_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs.housing_finance_agency_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Housing_Finance_Agencies)

SELECT ?name ?description ?interest_rate WHERE {
  ?housing_finance_agencies_loan_programs a :Housing_Finance_Agencies_Loan_Programs .

  ?housing_finance_agencies_loan_programs p:hasLoan_Programs ?loan_programs .

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the loan program interest rate for each housing finance agency.
Show me the descriptions of the loan programs that each finance agency offers.
Show me the interest rates and descriptions of the loan programs every finance agency offers.
